glosses.ja: 対抗する; ブロックする

sentences.target: Je contre son argument à table.

translations.fr: Je contre son argument à table.
translations.en: I counter his argument at the table.
translations.es: Rebato su argumento en la mesa.
translations.de: Ich widerlege sein Argument am Tisch.
translations.it: Contesto il suo argomento a tavola.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在餐桌上反驳他的观点。
translations.yue: 我喺餐枱度反駁佢嘅觀點。
translations.ru: Я оспариваю его аргумент за столом.
translations.pt: Refuto o argumento dele à mesa.
translations.he: אני מפריך את טענתו ליד השולחן.
translations.vi: Tôi phản bác lập luận của anh ấy ở bàn ăn.
translations.nl: Ik weerleg zijn argument aan tafel.
translations.uk: Я спростовую його аргумент за столом.
translations.hi: मैं मेज़ पर उसके तर्क का खंडन करता हूँ.
translations.el: Στο τραπέζι αντικρούω το επιχείρημά του.
translations.nb: Jeg imøtegår argumentet hans ved bordet.
translations.id: Aku membantah argumennya di meja makan.
translations.sv: Jag bemöter hans argument vid bordet.
translations.da: Jeg imødegår hans argument ved bordet.
translations.ja: 食卓で彼の主張に反論する。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb in present indicative (1SG) meaning 'to counter/oppose'.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular) modifying 'argument' (masculine singular).
Common noun; direct object of the verb 'contre'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement ('à table').
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à' forming a locative phrase.

sentences.target: Tu peux contrer leur plan rapidement.

translations.fr: Tu peux contrer leur plan rapidement.
translations.en: You can counter their plan quickly.
translations.de: Du kannst ihren Plan schnell vereiteln.
translations.it: Puoi sventare il loro piano rapidamente.
translations.ko: 너는 그들의 계획을 빠르게 저지할 수 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以迅速挫败他们的计划。
translations.yue: 你可以好快挫敗佢哋嘅計劃。
translations.ru: Ты можешь быстро сорвать их план.
translations.pt: Você pode frustrar o plano deles rapidamente.
translations.he: אתה יכול לסכל את התוכנית שלהם במהירות.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể nhanh chóng phá hỏng kế hoạch của họ.
translations.nl: Je kunt hun plan snel dwarsbomen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш швидко зірвати їхній план.
translations.hi: तुम उनकी योजना को जल्दी विफल कर सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να ματαιώσεις γρήγορα το σχέδιό τους.
translations.nb: Du kan raskt stoppe planen deres.
translations.id: Kamu bisa dengan cepat menggagalkan rencana mereka.
translations.sv: Du kan snabbt omintetgöra deras plan.
translations.ro: Poți să le zădărnicești planul rapid.
translations.da: Du kan hurtigt forpurre deres plan.
translations.ja: あなたは彼らの計画をすばやく阻止できる。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Modal verb in present indicative (2SG) expressing ability; selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'peux'.
Possessive determiner (3rd person plural possessor) modifying 'plan'.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive 'contrer'.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb phrase (how the action is performed).

sentences.target: Il contre le tir au basket.

translations.fr: Il contre le tir au basket.
translations.en: He blocks the shot in basketball.
translations.es: Él bloquea el tiro en el baloncesto.
translations.de: Er blockt den Wurf im Basketball.
translations.it: Lui stoppa il tiro a basket.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在篮球比赛中封盖投篮。
translations.yue: 佢喺籃球比賽入面封阻個投籃。
translations.pt: Ele bloqueia o arremesso no basquete.
translations.vi: Anh ấy chặn cú ném trong bóng rổ.
translations.ar: هو يصد التسديدة في كرة السلة.
translations.nl: Hij blokt het schot in basketbal.
translations.hi: वह बास्केटबॉल में शॉट को ब्लॉक करता है.
translations.id: Dia memblok tembakan dalam bola basket.
translations.ja: 彼はバスケットボールでシュートをブロックする。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb in present indicative (3SG) meaning 'to counter/block'.
Definite article (masculine singular) determining 'tir'.
Common noun; direct object of 'contre'.
Preposition realized as the contraction 'à + le'; introduces the locative/sport domain 'basket'.
Common noun (loanword); object of the preposition 'au' in the phrase 'au basket'.

sentences.target: Vous contrez son attaque aux échecs.

translations.fr: Vous contrez son attaque aux échecs.
translations.en: You counter his attack in chess.
translations.de: Du konterst seinen Angriff im Schach.
translations.it: Controbatti il suo attacco a scacchi.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在国际象棋中化解他的进攻。
translations.yue: 你喺國際象棋入面反制佢嘅進攻。
translations.ru: Ты отражаешь его атаку в шахматах.
translations.pt: Você neutraliza o ataque dele no xadrez.
translations.he: אתה מסכל את ההתקפה שלו בשחמט.
translations.vi: Bạn hóa giải đòn tấn công của anh ấy trong cờ vua.
translations.nl: Je pareert zijn aanval in het schaakspel.
translations.uk: Ти відбиваєш його атаку в шахах.
translations.hi: तुम शतरंज में उसके हमले का मुकाबला करते हो.
translations.el: Στο σκάκι αποκρούεις την επίθεσή του.
translations.nb: Du parerer angrepet hans i sjakk.
translations.sv: Du parerar hans attack i schack.
translations.da: Du parerer hans angreb i skak.
translations.ja: あなたはチェसで彼の攻撃に対抗する。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person (plural or formal singular); subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb in present indicative (2PL) meaning 'to counter'.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular) modifying 'attaque' (feminine singular).
Common noun; direct object of 'contrez'.
Preposition realized as the contraction 'à + les'; introduces the domain/location 'échecs'.
Plural common noun; object of the preposition 'aux' referring to the game of chess.

app_payload.word_ja: 対抗する; ブロックする
jp: Je contre son argument à table.
Tu peux contrer leur plan rapidement.
Il contre le tir au basket.
Vous contrez son attaque aux échecs.
fr: Je contre son argument à table.
Tu peux contrer leur plan rapidement.
Il contre le tir au basket.
Vous contrez son attaque aux échecs.
en: I counter his argument at the table.
You can counter their plan quickly.
He blocks the shot in basketball.
You counter his attack in chess.
